content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 14, 2004

Armando Madrigal
Armando’s Mexican Food
6905 El Camino Real
Atascadero, CA 93422

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-152

Dear Mr. Madrigal:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 The Act requires the Commission to provide formal written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person’s authorized representative. (Section 83114(b).) The Commission does not provide advice to third parties regarding a public official’s duties under the Act. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(B).) Consequently, we are unable to provide you with advice regarding the issues you raise in your letter, and your request for advice has been withdrawn.

If you believe a violation of the Act has occurred, you may file a complaint (form enclosed).

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Natalie Bocanegra
Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure
NB:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\04-152

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
